summary.title: Professional Summary
summary.text: Dynamic Mobile & Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience in JavaScript, TypeScript, Kotlin, React, and React Native. Experienced in building and optimizing scalable mobile and web applications, leveraging REST APIs, Node.js, and SQL/NoSQL databases. Strong focus on clean architecture, performance optimization, and maintainable code.

items.label: Languages & Core
items.value: JavaScript, TypeScript, Kotlin, C#, SQL, Mobile Development, Full Stack Development

items.label: Frontend & Mobile
items.value: React, React Native, Angular, Android, Figma, UX/UI

items.label: Backend & Data
items.value: Node.js, REST APIs, GraphQL, Supabase, SQLite, Room, Clean Architecture, Git, Agile/Scrum, Testing, Performance Optimization

roles.title: Front-end Developer
points: Develop scalable frontend solutions and reusable components for a high-traffic e-commerce platform.
Led frontend development of customer credit application flows and API integrations.
Redesigned PDP, PLP and Product Card interfaces improving usability and consistency.
Reduced technical debt through legacy refactors and project restructuring.

roles.title: Professor on Diploma in Video Game Development
points: Designed and delivered programming and game development curriculum.
Managed online courses and student groups.
Applied active learning methodologies for technical education.

roles.title: Mobile Developer
points: Developed React Native and Kotlin mobile apps with 20M+ downloads.
Integrated REST APIs and local storage solutions.
Collaborated with UX/UI teams and cross-functional stakeholders.
Improved performance and feature delivery in production apps.
